message:
test(conformance): add IVP solver performance profiling harness (P2C-001-H)

Add perf_ivp.rs as a standalone performance profiling test for the
initial value problem (IVP) solver, producing structured JSON evidence
artifacts at fixtures/artifacts/P2C-001/perf/perf_profile_report.json.

The harness profiles:
- validate_tol / validate_first_step / validate_max_step validators
- select_initial_step hotspot
- Full RK45 integration step

Each target gets warmup iterations followed by timed benchmark runs,
with p50/p95/p99 percentile extraction, top-3 hotspot ranking, and
behavior-isomorphism verification between baseline and optimized paths.

This supports the P2C-001 bead's evidence requirements for
optimization attempt logging and regression detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
